bills.title: Artificial Intelligence in Schools Transparency Act
bills.lastAction: Passed Senate 42-0. Referred to House Education Committee.
bills.policyRelevance: Requires school districts to disclose AI tools used in instruction, grading, and student assessment — setting a transparency floor for ed-tech AI.

bills.title: Child Chatbot Protection Act
bills.lastAction: Passed Senate Technology Committee 8-0. Awaiting floor vote.
bills.policyRelevance: Mandates age/ID verification before minors can access AI chatbots — a first-in-nation approach to minor-AI interaction.

bills.title: Chatbot Safety for Minors Act
bills.lastAction: Passed House. Companion bill to SB 1521.
bills.policyRelevance: House companion to SB 1521 creating parallel protections for minors interacting with AI chatbots.

bills.title: Data Center Energy Surcharge Act
bills.lastAction: Referred to House Energy & Natural Resources Committee.
bills.policyRelevance: Would impose an energy surcharge on large data centers consuming above a threshold — addressing AI infrastructure's growing demand on Oklahoma's grid.

bills.title: Data Center Infrastructure Cost Allocation Act
bills.policyRelevance: Ensures data center operators bear proportional costs for grid infrastructure upgrades rather than passing them to residential ratepayers.

bills.title: Oklahoma Computer Data Privacy Act
bills.lastAction: Signed by Gov. Stitt on March 20. Oklahoma becomes 20th state with comprehensive data privacy law.
bills.policyRelevance: Oklahoma's first comprehensive consumer data privacy law — gives residents rights over personal data collection, sale, and deletion by companies.

bills.title: Well Repurposing Act
bills.lastAction: Passed House 85-6. Sen. Jech carrying in Senate.
bills.policyRelevance: Converts abandoned oil/gas wells into geothermal energy sources — turning an environmental liability into clean energy infrastructure.

bills.title: AI-Generated Deepfake Disclosure Act
bills.lastAction: Under consideration in Senate Judiciary Committee.
bills.policyRelevance: Requires disclosure labeling on AI-generated deepfake content in political advertising and public communications.

bills.title: Deepfake Election Integrity Act
bills.lastAction: Referred to House Elections & Ethics Committee.
bills.policyRelevance: Criminalizes distribution of AI-generated deepfakes intended to influence elections within 90 days of an election.

bills.title: Insurance Algorithm Transparency Act
bills.policyRelevance: Requires insurance companies to disclose when AI algorithms are used in rate-setting and claims decisions, with an appeals process for consumers.
